joining our mastermind, our courses, or our coaching. So the ABCs, let's talk about it. First, the A is an attention grabbing profile picture. ## [12:04 - 14:15]

Like you want to use a term that is actually going to be searched for. No one is searching Fitfab Funkydiva 17. No one is searching for the Instagram marketing ninja, right? They're looking for an Instagram growth coach. So you want something that is general and that is broad enough that it's actually being searched for. But then on the other side of that line, you want to make sure that you're not being too broad, right? Like if you just put health coach, that is such a generic term that's going to be used by everyone, you're never going to stand out. When someone searches health coach, they're going to find the 50,000 other health coaches that are also on Instagram. So you have to walk that fine line between what is broad enough that it's actually being searched for and what is specific enough that it's going to allow people to find you.
